title: Advice Surgeries - Gerald Jones
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Merthyr Tydfil and Aberdare
headings: h3: Advice surgeries are appointment only. To make an appointment, please call 01685 383 739 or email Gerald.Jones.MP@parliament.uk.
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Gerald Jones Skip to main content About Privacy Policy Social Media Unacceptable Behaviour Policy Monthly Newsletters Newsletter sign up Contact me Get in touch Advice Surgeries Meet Gerald Free Tour of Parliament Tours of the Elizabeth Tower and Big Ben Educational Visits to the UK Parliament Emergency contacts Campaigns Bryn Pica Survey 2026 Barber Survery Cost of Living Support More Search Search the website Search Menu Advice Surgeries I'm here to help. As well as my work in Parliament, my team and I are available to help constituents all year round, with a range of issues. These include benefit entitlements, HMRC, housing, Home Office, and passport issues. I hold regular advice surgeries across the constituency. These are an opportunity for residents in Merthyr Tydfil & Aberdare to come and chat with me about issues where you feel I could offer advice and assistance. To discuss specific issues, and to book an appointment please get in touch . Advice surgeries are appointment only. To make an appointment, please call 01685 383 739 or email Gerald.Jones.MP@parliament.uk. April, May & June 2026 Date Time Location Friday, 10 April 3.30pm to 4.30pm Cwmbach, Aberdare Friday, 17 April 3pm to 3.30pm Dowlais, Merthyr Tydfil Friday, 15 May 2pm to 3pm Aberdare Friday, 29 May 2pm to 3pm Merthyr Tydfil Friday, 12 June 2pm to 3pm Pontsticill, Merthyr Tydfil Friday, 26 June 2pm to 3pm Llwydcoed, Aberdare Contact details Crownford House, Swan Street, Merthyr Tydfil CF47 8EU and First Floor, 27 a&b, High Street, Aberdare, CF44 7AA.
